name: tangent-works
documentation:
# Tangent Works Python Client

Tangent Information Modeler is Tangent Works’ automatic model building engine. It is designed specifically for time-series forecasting and anomaly detection.

The Tangent Works Python client introduces an easy and fast way to use Tangent Works in any Python project.

## Usage

### Installation

To install the package run: `pip install tangent-works`

## About Tangent Works

Tangent Works delivers forecasting and anomaly detection capabilities for time series data in a fast, accurate and explainable way. This enables users to drive business value from predictive analytics, empowers them to take informed decisions and helps them improve processes.

TIM has already been recognized as a winner in multiple competitions, including GEFCom 2017 and the 2017 ANDRITZ Hackathon.

variables.name: tangent_works.business_data.forecasting_model.TOL
documentation: numeric tolerance for comparison of two models

classes.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.__init__
documentation:
Parameters
----------
data : pd.DataFrame
    DataFrame containing the time series data.
timestamp_column : str, optional
    Name of the column containing timestamps. If not provided, timestamp column is detected automatically.
group_key_columns : list[str], optional
    A list of the column names which splits the panel data into individual groups. If empty, dataset is considered as individual time series data.

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.timestamps
documentation: Series of timestamps in the dataset.

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.columns
documentation: List of column names in the dataset.

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.sampling_period
documentation: Sampling period of the dataset.

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.validate
documentation:
Validates correctness of the dataset (column names and types, timestamps and data).

Parameters
----------
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns None. If False, the method returns the TimeSeries object reference.

Returns
-------
None or TimeSeries
    Returns None if inplace is True, otherwise returns the TimeSeries object reference.

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.time_scaling
documentation:
Resamples the dataset according to the provided configuration.

Parameters
----------
configuration : dict
    Configuration object containing the resampling parameters.

Returns
-------
TimeSeries
    TimeSeries object with resampled data.

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.imputation
documentation:
Imputes missing values in the dataset according to the provided imputation configuration.

Parameters
----------
configuration : dict
    Dictionary containing the imputation configuration for each column.

Returns
-------
TimeSeries
    TimeSeries object with imputed data.

methods.name: tangent_works.business_data.time_series.TimeSeries.validate_timestamps_alignment
documentation:
Validates alignment of timestamps with respect to the sampling period.

Parameters
----------
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns None. If False, the method returns the TimeSeries object reference.

Returns
-------
None or TimeSeries
    Returns None if inplace is True, otherwise returns the TimeSeries object reference.

A class used to represent a time series dataset.

Attributes
----------
timestamps : pd.Series
    Series of timestamps in the dataset.
columns : pd.Index
    List of column names in the dataset.
sampling_period : SamplingPeriod, optional
    Sampling period of the dataset. If not provided, sampling period is detected automatically.

Methods
-------
validate(inplace)
    Validates correctness of the dataset (column names and types, timestamps and data).
validate_timestamps_alignment(inplace)
    Validates alignment of timestamps with respect to the sampling period.
time_scaling(configuration)
    Resamples the dataset according to the provided configuration.
imputation(configuration)
    Imputes missing values in the dataset according to the provided imputation configuration.

modules.name: tangent_works
documentation:
Tangent is the Predictive AI for your daily predictions - delivering instant insights at scale at a fraction of the cost.

Classes
----------
TimeSeries
    A class used to represent a time series dataset.
Forecasting
    A class used to build forecasting models and make forecasts.
AutoForecasting
    A class used to to perform auto forecasting.
AnomalyDetection
    A class used to build anomaly detection models and detect anomalies.
PostProcessing
    A class used to do post-processing models and forecasting results.

classes.name: tangent_works.api.post_processing.PostProcessingApi

methods.name: tangent_works.api.post_processing.PostProcessingApi.result_table
documentation:
Extends the result table with additional information about training, testing, and production data.

Parameters
----------
forecasting : Forecasting or AutoForecasting
    Forecasting object.

Returns
-------
pd.DataFrame
    Post-processed results table.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.post_processing.PostProcessingApi.properties
documentation:
Extracts variable properties from the model-building response.

Parameters
----------
model : Dict[str, Any]
    A model-building response.

Returns
-------
pd.DataFrame
    Variable properties.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.post_processing.PostProcessingApi.features
documentation:
Extracts features from the model-building response.

Parameters
----------
model : Dict[str, Any]
    A model-building response.

Returns
-------
pd.DataFrame
    Features.

A class used to do post-processing models and forecasting results.

Methods
-------
result_table(forecasting):
    Extends the result table with additional information about training, testing, and production data.
properties(response):
    Extracts variable properties from the model.
features(response):
    Extracts features from the model-building response.

documentation:
Parameters
----------
time_series : TimeSeries, optional
    Time series data used for building the model and detecting anomalies.
configuration : Dict[str, Any], optional
    Configuration used for building the model.

documentation:
Creates AnomalyDetection object from existing model.

Parameters

model : Dict[str, Any] or AnomalyDetectionModel
    Anomaly detection model.

Returns
-------
AnomalyDetectionApi
    New AnomalyDetection object.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.result_table
documentation: Anomaly detection results table (is None when detect method was not called or new model was built).

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.rca_table
documentation: Root cause analysis table (is None when rca method was not called or new model was built).

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.time_series
documentation: Time series data used for building the model and detecting anomalies.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.configuration
documentation: Configuration used for building the model.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.model
documentation: Anomaly detection model.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.build_model
documentation:
Builds anomaly detection model.

Parameters
----------
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns None. If False, the method returns the AnomalyDetection object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
None or AnomalyDetection
    Returns None if inplace is True, otherwise returns the AnomalyDetection object reference.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.detect
documentation:
Detects anomalies in the time series data.

Parameters
----------
time_series : TimeSeries, optional
    Time series data used for detecting anomalies (if None, forecast is done on the same time series data as model building).
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns pd.Dataframe containing anomaly detection results table. If False, the method returns the AnomalyDetection object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
pd.DataFrame
    Anomaly detection results table.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.anomaly_detection.AnomalyDetectionApi.rca
documentation:
Performs root cause analysis.

Parameters
----------
configuration : Dict[str, Any], optional
    RCA configuration (if None, RCA is done in fully automatic mode).
time_series : TimeSeries, optional
    Time series data used for RCA (if None, RCA is done on the same time series data as model building).
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns Dict[int, pd.DataFrame] containing RCA table. If False, the method returns the AnomalyDetection object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
Dict[int, pd.DataFrame]
    RCA table.

A class used to build anomaly detection models and detect anomalies.

Attributes
----------
result_table : pd.DataFrame, optional
    Anomaly detection results table (is None when detect method was not called or new model was built).
rca_table : pd.DataFrame, optional
    Root cause analysis table (is None when rca method was not called or new model was built).
time_series : TimeSeries, optional
    Time series data used for building the model and detecting anomalies.
configuration : AnomalyDetectionBuildConfiguration
    Configuration used for building the model.
model : AnomalyDetectionModel, optional
    Anomaly detection model.

Methods
-------
from_model(model):
    Creates AnomalyDetection object from existing model.
build_model(inplace):
    Builds anomaly detection model.
detect(time_series, inplace):
    Detects anomalies in the time series data.
rca(configuration, time_series, inplace):
    Performs root cause analysis.

documentation: Forecasting results table (is None when run method was not called or new run was initiated).

methods.name: tangent_works.api.auto_forecasting.AutoForecastingApi.rca_table
documentation: Root cause analysis table (is None when rca method was not called or new run was initiated).

documentation: Time series data used for auto forecasting.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.auto_forecasting.AutoForecastingApi.configuration
documentation: Configuration used for auto forecasting.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.auto_forecasting.AutoForecastingApi.model
documentation: Forecasting model (is None when run method was not called).

methods.name: tangent_works.api.auto_forecasting.AutoForecastingApi.run
documentation:
Runs auto forecasting.

Parameters
----------
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method will return None. If False, the method will return AutoForecasting object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
None or AutoForecasting
    Returns None if inplace is True, otherwise returns the Forecasting object reference.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.auto_forecasting.AutoForecastingApi.preprocess_time_series
documentation:
Performs columns selection, time scaling and imputation on the time series data.

Returns
-------
TimeSeries
    Preprocessed time series data.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.auto_forecasting.AutoForecastingApi.rca
documentation:
Performs root cause analysis.

Parameters
----------
configuration : Dict[str, Any], optional
    RCA configuration (if None, RCA is done in fully automatic mode).
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns pd.Dataframe containing RCA table. If False, the method returns the Forecasting object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
TimeSeries
    RCA table.

A class used to to perform auto forecasting.

Attributes
----------
result_table : pd.DataFrame, optional
    Forecasting results table (is None when run method was not called or new run was initiated).
rca_table : pd.DataFrame, optional
    Root cause analysis table (is None when rca method was not called or new run was initiated).
time_series : TimeSeries
    Time series data used for auto forecasting.
configuration : AutoForecastingConfiguration
    Configuration used for auto forecasting.
model : ForecastingModel, optional
    Forecasting model (is None when run method was not called).

Methods
-------
run(inplace):
    Runs auto forecasting.
preprocess_time_series():
    Performs columns selection, time scaling and imputation on the time series data.
rca(configuration, inplace):
    Performs root cause analysis.

classes.name: tangent_works.business_logic.time_scaling.TimeScaler
documentation: The following code uses data offsets to resample time series.
Detailed documentation on the usage of data offsets can be found:
https://pandas.pydata.org/pandas-docs/stable/user_guide/timeseries.html#dateoffset-objects

ForecastingApi
    New Forecasting object.

documentation: Forecasting results table (is None when forecast method was not called or new model was built).

methods.name: tangent_works.api.forecasting.ForecastingApi.rca_table
documentation: Root cause analysis table (is None when rca method was not called or new model was built).

methods.name: tangent_works.api.forecasting.ForecastingApi.time_series
documentation: Time series data used for building the model and forecasting.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.forecasting.ForecastingApi.configuration
documentation: Configuration for building the model.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.forecasting.ForecastingApi.model
documentation: Forecasting model (is None when build_model method was not called).

methods.name: tangent_works.api.forecasting.ForecastingApi.build_model
documentation:
Builds a forecasting model.

Parameters
----------
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns None. If False, the method returns the Forecasting object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
None or Forecasting
    Returns None if inplace is True, otherwise returns the Forecasting object reference.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.forecasting.ForecastingApi.forecast
documentation:
Makes a forecast.

Parameters
----------
configuration : Dict[str, Any], optional
    Forecasting configuration (if None, forecasting is done in fully automatic mode).
time_series : TimeSeries, optional
    Time series data used for forecasting (if None, forecast is done on the same time series data as model building).
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns pd.Dataframe containing forecasting results table. If False, the method returns the Forecasting object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
pd.DataFrame
    Forecasting results table.

methods.name: tangent_works.api.forecasting.ForecastingApi.rca
documentation:
Performs root cause analysis.

Parameters
----------
configuration : Dict[str, Any], optional
    RCA configuration (if None, RCA is done in fully automatic mode).
time_series : TimeSeries, optional
    Time series data used for RCA (if None, RCA is done on the same time series data as model building).
inplace : bool, optional
    If True, the method returns Dict[int, pd.DataFrame] containing RCA table. If False, the method returns the Forecasting object reference.
status_poll : bool, optional
    If True, the job status is periodically checked and printed to the console.

Returns
-------
Dict[int, pd.DataFrame]
    RCA table.

A class used to build forecasting models and make forecasts.

Attributes
----------
result_table : pd.DataFrame, optional
    Forecasting results table (is None when forecast method was not called or new model was built).
rca_table : pd.DataFrame, optional
    Root cause analysis table (is None when rca method was not called or new model was built).
time_series : TimeSeries, optional
    Time series data used for building the model and forecasting.
configuration : BuildConfiguration
    Configuration for building the model.
model : ForecastingModel, optional
    Forecasting model (is None when build_model method was not called).

Methods
-------
from_model(model):
    Creates a Forecasting object from existing model.
build_model(inplace):
    Builds a forecasting model.
forecast(configuration, time_series, inplace):
    Makes a forecast.
rca(configuration, time_series, inplace):
    Performs root cause analysis.
